title: Section 1
content: (1) This Act may be called the Export (Quality Control and Inspection) Act, 1963. (2) It extends to the whole of India. (3) It shall come into force on such date 1 as the Central Government may, by Notification in the Official Gazette, appoint.
footnote: 1 1st January, 1964, vide notification No. S.O. 3604(E), dated the 30th December, 1963, see Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, Sec. 3(ii).
